attribution: Synthetic field shaped like ESA Planck PR3 polarization (real upstream FITS is 2 GB; not bakeable)
note: Synthetic dust-aligned model matching Planck PR3 large-scale morphology — see bake-planck-polarization.ts. Upstream SMICA QU FITS (NSIDE 2048, ≈2 GB) is too large to fetch in a bake; no precomputed NSIDE 16 downgrade is published by ESA.
